2604.08890.title: A Closer Look at the Application of Causal Inference in Graph Representation Learning
2604.08890.paper_summary: Modeling causal relationships in graph representation learning remains a fundamental challenge. Existing approaches often draw on theories and methods from causal inference to identify causal subgraphs or mitigate confounders. However, due to the inherent complexity of graph-structured data, these approaches frequently aggregate diverse graph elements into single causal variables, an operation that risks violating the core assumptions of causal inference. In this work, we prove that such aggregation compromises causal validity. Building on this conclusion, we propose a theoretical model grounded in the smallest indivisible units of graph data to ensure that the causal validity is guaranteed. With this model, we further analyze the costs of achieving precise causal modeling in graph representation learning and identify the conditions under which the problem can be simplified. To empirically support our theory, we construct a controllable synthetic dataset that reflects realworld causal structures and conduct extensive experiments for validation. Finally, we develop a causal modeling enhancement module that can be seamlessly integrated into existing graph learning pipelines, and we demonstrate its effectiveness through comprehensive comparative experiments.
2604.08890.paper_summary_zh: 建模圖形表示學習中的因果關係仍然是一個基本挑戰。<lb/>現有的方法通常借鑒因果推斷的理論和方法，以識別因果子圖或減輕混淆因素。<lb/>然而，由於圖結構數據的固有複雜性，這些方法經常將多樣的圖元素聚合為單一的因果變量，這一操作有可能違反因果推斷的核心假設。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們證明了這種聚合會損害因果有效性。<lb/>基於這一結論，我們提出了一個理論模型，基於圖數據中最小的不可分割單位，以確保因果有效性得到保障。<lb/>利用這個模型，我們進一步分析了在圖形表示學習中實現精確因果建模的成本，並確定了問題可以簡化的條件。<lb/>為了實證支持我們的理論，我們構建了一個可控的合成數據集，反映現實世界的因果結構，並進行了廣泛的實驗以進行驗證。<lb/>最後，我們開發了一個因果建模增強模塊，可以無縫集成到現有的圖學習管道中，並通過全面的比較實驗展示其有效性。
2604.08890.author: Hang Gao et.al.
2604.08890.authors: Hang Gao, Kunyu Li, Huang Hong, Baoquan Cui, Fengge Wu
